allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 20; try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080" -TimeoutSec 10 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Servidor respondeu: $\($response.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Status: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 15; $tcp = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; try { $tcp.Connect\("localhost", 8080\); Write-Host "Porta 8080 ABERTA - servidor rodando!"; $tcp.Close\(\) } catch { Write-Host "Porta 8080 ainda fechada, aguardando mais..." })

PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "`$env:JAVA_HOME='C:\\Program Files\\Zulu\\zulu-11'; `$env:PATH='C:\\Program Files\\Zulu\\zulu-11\\bin;C:\\tools\\apache-maven-3.9.6\\bin;'+`$env:PATH; Set-Location 'c:\\Users\\Pablo\\Documents\\cards\\jogo-cartas'; mvn jetty:run '-Dmaven.buildNumber.doCheck=false' '-Dmaven.buildNumber.doUpdate=false'"; Write-Host "Iniciando...")

PowerShell($timeout = 60; $elapsed = 0; do { Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $elapsed += 5; $tcp = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; try { $tcp.Connect\("localhost", 8080\); $tcp.Close\(\); Write-Host "Servidor pronto em http://localhost:8080"; break } catch { Write-Host "Aguardando... \($elapsed s\)" } } while \($elapsed -lt $timeout\))

PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "`$env:JAVA_HOME='C:\\Program Files\\Zulu\\zulu-11'; `$env:PATH='C:\\Program Files\\Zulu\\zulu-11\\bin;C:\\tools\\apache-maven-3.9.6\\bin;'+`$env:PATH; Set-Location 'c:\\Users\\Pablo\\Documents\\cards\\jogo-cartas'; mvn jetty:run '-Dmaven.buildNumber.doCheck=false' '-Dmaven.buildNumber.doUpdate=false'")
